reason: The node invokes the 'face-commutant correspondence' to establish the equivalence Spec(A) = {dim_R(pi_phi(A)'^{sa}) - 1 : phi in S(A)}, but does NOT list node 1.1 (Face-Commutant Correspondence -- Alfsen-Shultz) as a dependency. Node 1.1 establishes exactly the identity dim(F_{S(A)}(phi)) = dim_R(pi_phi(A)'^{sa}) - 1 that is being used here. This dependency must be declared.
